name: feverpain_score_calculation_workflow
description: Calculate the FeverPAIN score by evaluating five criteria and summing their points.

inputs.input_desc: Whether the patient had fever in the past 24 hours. true or false.
Whether there is absence of cough or coryza. true or false.
Whether symptom onset is within 3 days. true or false.
Whether purulent tonsils are present. true or false.
Whether severe tonsil inflammation is present. true or false.

steps.step_description: Assign FeverPAIN point for fever in past 24 hours.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether the patient had fever in past 24 hours. true or false.

steps.reason: This step evaluates a single condition (fever presence) to assign a binary score, which fits the condition_evaluation template for branching logic.
steps.detail: If fever_past_24h is true, assign 1 point; if false, assign 0 points.

steps.step_description: Assign FeverPAIN point for absence of cough or coryza.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether there is absence of cough or coryza. true or false.

steps.reason: A binary scoring rule based on a single condition, suitable for condition_evaluation template.
steps.detail: If absence_cough_coryza is true, assign 1 point; if false, assign 0 points.

steps.step_description: Assign FeverPAIN point for symptom onset within 3 days.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether symptom onset is within 3 days. true or false.

step_outputs.output_desc: Point for symptom onset criterion (0 or 1)

steps.reason: Binary scoring based on a yes/no condition, matching condition_evaluation template.
steps.detail: If onset_within_3days is true, assign 1 point; if false, assign 0 points.

steps.step_description: Assign FeverPAIN point for purulent tonsils.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether purulent tonsils are present. true or false.

step_outputs.output_desc: Point for purulent tonsils criterion (0 or 1)

steps.reason: Direct condition-to-score mapping, ideal for condition_evaluation.
steps.detail: If purulent_tonsils is true, assign 1 point; if false, assign 0 points.

steps.step_description: Assign FeverPAIN point for severe tonsil inflammation.

step_inputs.input_desc: Whether severe tonsil inflammation is present. true or false.

step_outputs.output_desc: Point for severe inflammation criterion (0 or 1)

steps.reason: Binary condition evaluation for scoring, matching condition_evaluation template.
steps.detail: If severe_inflammation is true, assign 1 point; if false, assign 0 points.

steps.step_description: Sum all five criterion points to compute total FeverPAIN score.

step_inputs.input_desc: Point for symptom onset criterion (0 or 1)
Point for purulent tonsils criterion (0 or 1)
Point for severe inflammation criterion (0 or 1)

steps.reason: This step performs a straightforward summation formula on five numeric inputs, which fits the formula_calculation template for arithmetic computation.
steps.detail: Sum all five input points: total = fever_point + cough_coryza_point + onset_point + tonsils_point + inflammation_point. Result is an integer between 0 and 5 inclusive.
